habitat: High Andes of Peru (and Bolivia); extreme altitude cultivation.
traditionalUsesEn: Andean traditional food and fertility/vitality tonic; modern powdered superfood export.
traditionalUsesDe: Andine Traditionalspeise und Vitalitätstonikum; modernes Pulver-Exportprodukt.
preparation: Dried powder in food and smoothies; gelatinized powders common.
cautions: Food amounts typical. Hormonal claims need evidence-based medical context.
historicalNotes: Inca-era highland staple of the Junín plateau.
habitatDe: High Andes von Peru (und Bolivia); extreme altitude cultivation.
preparationDe: Getrocknet powder in food und smoothies; gelatinized powders common.
cautionsDe: Nahrungsmengen typical. Hormonal claims need evidence-based medical context.
historicalNotesDe: Inca-era highlund staple von die Junín plateau.
